summary.zh: 科幻预言、技术狂热与 AI 寒冬
summary.en: Sci-Fi Prophecy, Hype and AI Winters

description.zh: 到 1987 年，专用 Lisp 机与专家系统基础设施市场开始崩塌，因为更便宜的通用工作站追了上来。在情绪周期中，这是商业侧的寒冬：围绕专家系统建立的期待，撞上了维护成本、脆弱知识工程与硬件商品化。
description.en: By 1987, the market for specialized Lisp machines and expert-system infrastructure was collapsing as cheaper general-purpose workstations caught up. In the emotional cycle, this is the business-side winter: expectations built around expert systems met maintenance cost, brittle knowledge engineering and hardware commoditization.

place.zh: 美国 AI 专用硬件市场

role.en: MIT Lisp Machine pioneer and founder of Lisp Machines, Inc.
role.zh: MIT Lisp Machine 先驱、Lisp Machines, Inc. 创始人

role.en: MIT hacker who reimplemented Symbolics advances for the shared Lisp Machine system and later launched GNU
role.zh: 为共享的 Lisp Machine 系统重新实现 Symbolics 改进、后来发起 GNU 的 MIT 黑客

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
